title: SCDenizenBridge
description: A bridge between Denizen and SimpleClans minecraft plugins.
body:
![the plugin in action](https://mikasa.host/storage/simpleclans/sc-denizen-bridge.png)
SCDenizenBridge is a powerful extension that integrates SimpleClans with Denizen, allowing server owners and developers to create highly customized clan-related scripts.

## Key Features:
### Clan Commands & Management
Create, invite, promote, demote, disband clans with custom scripts.
Bulletin board system for clan messaging.
Configurable permissions for deposits, withdrawals, and friendly fire.

### Tag System for Clans & Players
Access detailed clan information, such as members, balance, tag color, and more.
Retrieve player statistics like KDR, rank, trusted status, and past clans.
Fully adjustable clan attributes for fine-tuned customization.

### Event Handling
Supports real-time scripting for clan creation, promotions, balance updates, and rival removals.
Event contexts allow dynamic interaction, e.g., triggering actions when a clan disbands.
War and combat tracking with detailed context data.

### Frame System for Custom GUIs
Build interactive GUI elements for clan management using Denizen scripts.
Supports titles, sizes, parent-child relations, and more.

### Compatibility & Flexibility
Works seamlessly with Denizen’s powerful scripting system.
Backward compatibility with older versions (2.1 & 3.0.1) while using modern event handling.

Wiki: https://wiki.roinujnosde.me/scdenizenbridge/ \
Support: https://discord.gg/CkNwgdE
